name: Gauntlet
short_description: Working as a common grunt for CannoSec, you have been chosen by the owner to be a candidate as a distinguished Elite. A position thousands in CannoSec work hard to attain. However, you have to show CannoSec that you are a worthy candidate through the Certification Run. Are you meant for this?
detailed_description:
About

From a common grunt, you have been chosen by the owner of CannoSec to be a distinguished Elite. However, you will need to prove your worth to CannoSec that you got what it takes to be an Elite through the Certification Run.

Wave Combat

Equipped with the Gauntlet prepared by CannoSec, you must fight through waves of enemies and Elites to complete your Progress. 

Progress

The more Progress you complete, the harder the challenge becomes. It will take more than constantly shooting to complete future Progresses.

Gauntlet

The Gauntlet, having two firing modes and Gauntlet Skill, installed, gives the Player multiple options into approaching the fights ahead. Fire and blast your enemies and Elites to show them what you're made of!

Upgrades and Crafting

Completed Progresses leaves you with Experience and Crafting Materials to strengthen your Gauntlet and craft Consumables to improve your survivability and combat!
